composition.en: She wrote a short composition about her holiday.
composition.zh: 她寫了一篇關於假期的短文。

concept.en: The concept of time is hard to explain.

concerning.en: I have a question concerning the test.
concerning.zh: 我有一個關於考試的問題。

concrete.en: The floor is made of concrete.

conference.zh: 她參加了一場科學研討會。

confess.en: He confessed that he broke the vase.

confusion.en: There was confusion about the meeting time.
confusion.zh: 大家對開會時間感到困惑。

congratulate.en: We congratulated her on her success.

congress.zh: 國會通過了一項新法律。

conquer.en: He conquered his fear of heights.

conscience.en: His conscience told him to tell the truth.

consequent.en: Heavy rain and the consequent floods caused damage.
consequent.zh: 大雨及隨之而來的洪水造成損害。

conservative.en: He has conservative views on change.
conservative.zh: 他對改變抱持保守的看法。

consist.en: The team consists of five players.
consist.zh: 這支隊伍由五名球員組成。

consistent.en: She gives consistent effort every day.
consistent.zh: 她每天都付出穩定的努力。

construct.en: They will construct a new bridge.

construction.en: The construction of the school took two years.
construction.zh: 這所學校的建造花了兩年。

constructive.en: She gave me some constructive advice.
constructive.zh: 她給了我一些有建設性的建議。

consult.en: You should consult a doctor about the pain.
consult.zh: 你應該為這個疼痛去看醫生。

consultant.en: The company hired a business consultant.
consultant.zh: 公司聘請了一位商業顧問。

consume.en: The car consumes a lot of gas.

consumer.en: Consumers want good products at low prices.
consumer.zh: 消費者想要物美價廉的產品。

container.en: She put the soup in a plastic container.
container.zh: 她把湯裝進塑膠容器裡。

content.en: The content of the book is interesting.

content-2.en: She felt content with her simple life.
content-2.zh: 她對自己簡單的生活感到滿足。

contest.en: He won first place in the writing contest.
contest.zh: 他在作文比賽中得了第一名。

context.en: Guess the word's meaning from the context.
context.zh: 從上下文猜這個字的意思。

continual.en: The continual noise gave me a headache.
continual.zh: 持續不斷的噪音讓我頭痛。

continuous.en: There was continuous rain for three days.

contrary.en: Contrary to my hopes, it rained.
contrary.zh: 和我希望的相反，竟然下雨了。

contrast.en: There is a sharp contrast between the two cities.
contrast.zh: 這兩座城市有著鮮明的對比。

contribute.en: Everyone contributed money to the gift.

contribution.en: Her contribution to the team was great.

convenience.zh: 為了方便我在網路上購物。

convention.en: Shaking hands is a common convention.

conventional.zh: 他們選擇了傳統的婚禮。

converse.en: They conversed quietly in the corner.

convey.zh: 她的表情傳達出深深的悲傷。

convince.en: He convinced me to try the new dish.
convince.zh: 他說服我嘗試那道新菜。

cooperate.en: The two groups agreed to cooperate.

cooperation.zh: 這個專案需要每個人的合作。

cooperative.en: The students were helpful and cooperative.
cooperative.zh: 學生們既樂於助人又願意合作。

cope.en: She learned to cope with stress.

copper.en: The old coins are made of copper.

cord.en: Please tie the box with a cord.

correspond.en: Her answer corresponds with the facts.

costume.en: She wore a witch costume on Halloween.

cottage.en: They spent the weekend in a country cottage.
cottage.zh: 他們在鄉間小屋度過週末。

council.en: The city council discussed the new park.
council.zh: 市議會討論了新公園的事。

courageous.en: It was courageous of her to speak up.

courtesy.en: He always treats others with courtesy.
courtesy.zh: 他總是有禮貌地對待別人。

coward.en: Don't be a coward; try your best.
coward.zh: 別當膽小鬼，盡力試試看。

crack.en: There is a crack in the glass.

craft.en: Making pottery is a traditional craft.

creation.en: The painting is her best creation.
creation.zh: 這幅畫是她最好的作品。

creep.en: The cat crept quietly toward the bird.
creep.zh: 貓悄悄地朝那隻鳥爬去。

critic.en: A film critic reviewed the new movie.
critic.zh: 一位影評人評論了這部新電影。

critical.en: Clean water is critical for health.
critical.zh: 乾淨的水對健康至關重要。

criticism.zh: 她有禮貌地接受了批評。

criticize.zh: 別不經思考就批評別人。

crunchy.zh: 這顆脆脆的蘋果嚐起來很新鮮。

crush.en: The machine crushes the cans flat.

cube.en: She dropped an ice cube into her drink.
cube.zh: 她在飲料裡放了一塊冰塊。

cue.en: The actor waited for his cue to enter.
cue.zh: 演員等待他上場的提示。

cunning.en: The cunning fox tricked the birds.
cunning.zh: 狡猾的狐狸騙了那些鳥。

curiosity.en: Her curiosity led her to ask questions.
curiosity.zh: 她的好奇心驅使她發問。

curl.en: She has natural curls in her hair.

curse.en: In the story, a witch put a curse on the prince.
curse.zh: 在故事裡，女巫對王子下了詛咒。

curve.en: The road has a sharp curve ahead.

cushion.en: She rested her head on a soft cushion.
cushion.zh: 她把頭靠在柔軟的靠墊上。

damp.en: The towel is still a little damp.

deadline.en: The deadline for the report is Friday.
deadline.zh: 報告的截止日是星期五。

declare.en: The judge declared him the winner.

decoration.en: We put up decorations for the party.

defeat.en: Our team suffered a heavy defeat.

defense.en: The castle had a strong defense.
defense.zh: 這座城堡有堅固的防禦。

defensible.en: His argument is reasonable and defensible.
defensible.zh: 他的論點合理且站得住腳。

defensive.zh: 被質問時他變得很防備。

definite.en: We need a definite answer by tomorrow.
definite.zh: 我們明天前需要一個明確的答案。

delicate.en: The glass cup is very delicate.

delight.en: The gift filled her with delight.
delight.zh: 這份禮物讓她滿心歡喜。

delightful.en: We had a delightful evening together.
delightful.zh: 我們一起度過了愉快的夜晚。

demonstration.zh: 我們看了一場烹飪示範。

dense.en: The forest was dark and dense.

depart.en: The train departs at nine sharp.

departure.en: Check the departure time before you leave.
departure.zh: 出發前確認一下發車時間。

dependent.en: Young children are dependent on their parents.

depression.en: He suffered from depression after the loss.
depression.zh: 失去親人後他陷入憂鬱。

deserve.en: She deserves a reward for her hard work.
deserve.zh: 她努力工作，應該得到獎勵。

desperate.en: The lost hikers were desperate for water.
desperate.zh: 迷路的登山客極度需要水。

despite.en: Despite the rain, the game went on.
despite.zh: 儘管下雨，比賽仍照常進行。

destruction.zh: 暴風雨造成了嚴重的破壞。

devise.zh: 他們設計了一個巧妙的計畫。

devote.en: She devotes her free time to helping others.
devote.zh: 她把空閒時間奉獻給幫助別人。

diagram.en: The diagram shows how the machine works.
diagram.zh: 這張圖解說明機器如何運作。

differ.en: Our opinions differ on this matter.
differ.zh: 我們在這件事上意見不同。

digest.en: It takes time to digest a big meal.
digest.zh: 消化一頓大餐需要時間。

dignity.en: He faced the hard times with dignity.
dignity.zh: 他有尊嚴地面對艱難時刻。

diligence.en: Her diligence earned her good grades.
diligence.zh: 她的勤奮為她贏得了好成績。

diligent.en: He is a diligent and careful student.
diligent.zh: 他是個勤奮又細心的學生。

diploma.en: She received her diploma at graduation.
diploma.zh: 她在畢業典禮上拿到了文憑。

diplomat.en: The diplomat works in another country.
diplomat.zh: 這位外交官在另一個國家工作。

disability.en: The building is friendly to people with a disability.
disability.zh: 這棟建築對身障人士很友善。

disadvantage.en: Being short is a disadvantage in basketball.
disadvantage.zh: 個子矮在籃球上是個劣勢。

disappoint.en: I don't want to disappoint my parents.

disaster.en: The flood was a terrible disaster.
disaster.zh: 那場洪水是個可怕的災難。

discipline.en: Good discipline helps you reach your goals.
discipline.zh: 良好的自律幫助你達成目標。

disguise.en: He wore a mask as a disguise.

disgust.en: The dirty kitchen filled her with disgust.
disgust.zh: 髒亂的廚房讓她感到噁心。

dismiss.en: The teacher dismissed the class early.

disorder.en: The room was in complete disorder.

dispute.en: They had a dispute over the bill.
dispute.zh: 他們為了帳單起了爭執。

distinct.en: Each flower has a distinct smell.
distinct.zh: 每朵花都有獨特的香味。

distinguish.en: It is hard to distinguish the twins.

distinguished.zh: 他是一位傑出的科學家。

distribute.en: They distributed food to the poor.
distribute.zh: 他們把食物分發給窮人。

distribution.en: The distribution of the books was fair.

district.en: She lives in a quiet district of the city.
district.zh: 她住在城裡一個安靜的區。

disturb.en: Please don't disturb the sleeping baby.
disturb.zh: 請不要打擾正在睡覺的寶寶。

diverse.en: The city has a diverse population.
diverse.zh: 這座城市的人口很多元。

diversity.en: We celebrate the diversity of cultures.
diversity.zh: 我們讚揚文化的多元性。

divine.en: People believed the king had divine power.
divine.zh: 人們相信國王擁有神聖的力量。

divorce.en: After the divorce, the children lived with their mother.
divorce.zh: 離婚後孩子和母親同住。

dodge.en: He dodged the ball just in time.

dominant.en: The dominant lion led the group.
dominant.zh: 佔主導地位的獅子帶領著族群。

dominate.en: One team dominated the whole game.
dominate.zh: 一支隊伍主宰了整場比賽。

draft.en: She wrote a first draft of her essay.

dread.en: I dread going to the dentist.

drift.en: The empty boat drifted out to sea.

drill.en: We had a fire drill at school today.
drill.zh: 我們今天在學校做了防火演習。

drowsy.en: The warm room made me feel drowsy.
drowsy.zh: 溫暖的房間讓我昏昏欲睡。

durable.en: These boots are strong and durable.
durable.zh: 這雙靴子既堅固又耐用。

dynamic.en: She is a dynamic and energetic leader.
dynamic.zh: 她是個充滿活力的領導者。

dynasty.en: The dynasty ruled for three hundred years.
dynasty.zh: 這個王朝統治了三百年。

earnest.en: He made an earnest effort to improve.

earphone.en: She listened to music with earphones.

economic.zh: 這個國家面臨經濟問題。

economical.en: This small car is very economical.

economist.zh: 經濟學家預測物價會上漲。

economy.zh: 這個國家的經濟正在成長。

efficiency.en: The new system improved our efficiency.
efficiency.zh: 新系統提升了我們的效率。

elastic.en: The shorts have an elastic waist.

electronics.en: The store sells phones and other electronics.
electronics.zh: 這家店賣手機和其他電子產品。

elegant.en: She wore an elegant black dress.
elegant.zh: 她穿著一件優雅的黑色禮服。

elementary.en: My sister is in elementary school.

eliminate.zh: 我們必須消除粗心的錯誤。

elsewhere.en: If you can't find it here, look elsewhere.
elsewhere.zh: 如果這裡找不到，去別處看看。

embarrass.en: Don't embarrass me in front of my friends.
embarrass.zh: 別在我朋友面前讓我難堪。
